client_id.description: Zoho OAuth 2.0 client ID for the refresh-token grant. Used only in the token-request form; never logged.

client_secret.description: Zoho OAuth 2.0 client secret. Used only in the token-request form; never logged.

client_refresh_token.description: Long-lived Zoho OAuth 2.0 refresh token. Exchanged for a short-lived access token at token_url; never logged. The 3-legged consent/acquisition dance is out of scope (credentials layer already owns it).

base_url.description: Zoho Bigin API base URL override for tests or region-specific data centers (e.g. https://www.zohoapis.eu/bigin/v2).

token_url.description: Zoho OAuth 2.0 token endpoint override. MUST be https in production; the hook fails closed on a non-https or unparseable value to prevent exfiltrating the refresh token to an attacker-chosen endpoint.

module_name.description: Zoho Bigin module API name used by the 'records' stream (e.g. Deals, Contacts). Legacy defaults to Deals when unset.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
